---
title: q.env Roadmap
---

Only open work is listed here. Completed items are removed.

## Planned

- [ ] Add system-memory information to runtime snapshots
- [ ] Detect notebook, CI, container, and WSL execution contexts
- [ ] Add Python and key package versions for reproducibility reports

Cross-project configuration candidates are tracked in the
[project roadmap](../roadmap.qmd#ideas).
